# FM cockpit operable-cold banner — the surface names WHY it shows sample data (W2 census leaf 2, #13015)

## Context

Leaf 2 of the W2 live-wiring census (deposited on #13015, 2026-07-16). The design SSOT's "Operable cold" lane demands the cockpit be honest when the fleet spine is absent — today's substrate is fail-closed but SILENT about the cause.

## The Problem

When the fleet server is down (or was never started — the #15283 boot seam), every read fails closed to the honestly-labelled JSON seeds and the controls dead-end. The ADAPTER layer knows exactly why (`sample` vs `stale` vs `live` adapter states, the capability envelopes carry degraded reasons) — but no surface SAYS it. The operator sees sample residents and dead buttons with zero explanation: fail-closed data, fail-silent UX. That silence is a large share of the lived "FM is not functional" verdict.

## The Architectural Reality

- The truth already exists per surface: `gridAdapterState` / `streamAdapterState` (`sample`/`stale`/`live`), the bridge capability envelopes (`state: wired|degraded|not-wired` + reasons), and the lifecycle adapter's honest rejections. This leaf RENDERS existing truth; it produces no new probes.
- One cockpit-level banner (shell chrome — the control-bar region the toolbar owns), not per-pane noise: the shell aggregates the adapter states into one honest line — e.g. "Fleet server offline — showing sample data (`npm run ai:fleet-server`)" cold, "Live" quiet/absent, "Degraded — <reason>" stale. Nominal earns zero pixels (the #15037 exception-based discipline applied to chrome).
- Composes with #15283 (boot integration): after that leaf lands, the cold state becomes rare — the banner stays as the honest path for server death mid-session and deliberate cold boots.
- Design bar: registry-adjacent chrome; compose existing tokens; Grace's sign-off per the #15242 AC pattern.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] One shell-level status line derives from the EXISTING adapter/capability states: cold (no bridge reach) names the cause + the one-command remedy; degraded names the reason; live renders nothing (zero nominal pixels).
- [ ] State transitions are live: the banner appears on server death mid-session and clears on recovery without a reload (the adapter states already re-poll).
- [ ] No new probes/transports — render-only over existing truth; fail-closed behavior byte-unchanged.
- [ ] Both themes; a11y (`role="status"`, polite announcement); Grace design sign-off per the #15242 pattern.
- [ ] Unit specs: the aggregation matrix (per-surface states → banner state) + zero-pixel-nominal assertion; NL e2e touch on the live module.

## Out of Scope

The boot seam itself (#15283) · per-pane freshness labels (landed substrate) · wake/throttle telltales (#15273 — per-AGENT truth; this banner is per-SPINE truth).

## Related

Epic #13015 (parent) · the W2 census comment · #15283 (sibling leaf 1) · #15037 (density/exception discipline) · #15254 (registry — chrome entries reference it) · D#15249 (the wave's design record).
